author: asuramaya
name: Conker-5 Tandem Residual Exact Experts (MLX, non-record)
blurb: Non-record unlimited-compute submission. Tandem-trained Conker-3 + sparse exact residual experts (exact1/2/3, delim2, special2, number2, markup2, attr2) with gate-only learned selection, trained 1000 steps on MLX and packaged as int6+zlib.
